title: LLM-generated PowerShell wired into the auto-executed SOAR gate with no denylist / review gate
recommendation: Run core.cve_fix_advisor.scan_powershell (A-03 denylist) on the model block in tune_containment before pb.write_text/_register_in_gate; refuse destructive blocks and fall back to _fallback_block. Optionally hash-stamp and require a review gate.

title: posture_hardening.execute_remediation runs AI-generated PowerShell without the A-03 destructive denylist
recommendation: Apply scan_powershell to the generated script both at _generate_remediation (refuse to stamp destructive scripts) and in execute_remediation before _run_powershell_file; make the AAR-dialog bulk _apply require the same per-script confirmation as the single-fix path.

title: SOAR gate + playbooks directory is a writable trust boundary (potential local privilege escalation)
component: mitigation_gate.ps1 (repo root) + playbooks/*.ps1, written by src/angerona/shark/playbook_tuner.py:78-88,114; run elevated via engines/defense_monitor.py:74
recommendation: Verify the gate script and playbooks/ dir are not writable by non-admins before running (deny/log), or relocate the runtime gate + generated playbooks to a per-user protected data dir (e.g. %LOCALAPPDATA%\Angerona\playbooks) with a restrictive ACL Angerona controls.

title: Dead legacy sniffer leaks observed remote IPs to a third party over plaintext HTTP
recommendation: Delete the dead engines/sniffer.py, or if kept switch geolocation to HTTPS and gate it behind explicit opt-in like remote_bridge/siem_forwarder.
